title: Uniface Servers
breadcrumbs: Deployment Considerations for Performance and Scalability
text: Uniface Servers The location and configuration of Uniface servers and tools can affect performance. Servers and tools used in deploying Uniface include: Uniface Router—starts and stops Uniface Application Server processes, balances the load of the overall application, and passes messages between various Uniface processes. Uniface Router Monitor—monitors the performance of a Uniface Router, including the application servers and clients that use the Uniface Router. Enables you to fine-tune the performance of the Uniface Router. Uniface Application Server—enables Uniface clients to access remote resources or to execute remote components. The Uniface Router is responsible for all communication between the client and server. Web Application Server—integrates with a servlet engine running on a Web server (such as Tomcat, Apache Web Server, Microsoft Internet Information Server, and others). Was this topic helpful?
